Package org.eventb.core.ast

Interface ITypeVisitor

All Known Implementing Classes:
ArgumentTypeChecker, ExtensionHarvester, SetSubstitution, TypeRewriter, TypeSubstitution, TypeTranslatabilityChecker
public interface ITypeVisitor
Simple visitor for traversing types. The traversal of the type hierarchy is up to the implementor of this interface.

Type variables (which are used internally by the AST type-checking algorithm are not supported by this interface).

This interface is intended to be implemented by clients who contribute new visitors.

Since:
2.7
See Also:
  • Type.accept(ITypeVisitor)
